what was the Kanasa and Nebraska Act

	A.	
a law that allowed Kansas and Nebraska to choose wither to allow slavery 

	B.	
A law that made both states free states 

	C.	
A law that made both states slave states
A. a law that allowed Kansas and Nebraska to choose whether to allow slavery
